resources.string: Lets Immortal confirm the app-install dialog automatically, so apps deployed over WiFi from the fleet manager install without a tap on this Portal.
Lets Immortal show its quick buttons (like the app switcher) in step with the Portal\'s top bar — it watches for the bar being revealed. It doesn\'t read screen content.
Swipe from the right edge of the screen to go back in any app. Immortal must be enabled in Accessibility settings for this to work.
